'''dhakapa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kabbalism|kabbalism]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-k-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kabbalism|kabbalism]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhakapa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhækæpæth|dhækæpæth]] || [[word:dhækæpæj|dhækæpæj]] || [[word:dhækæpæsh|dhækæpæsh]] || [[word:dhækæpæ|dhækæpæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhakakapath|dhakakapath]] || [[word:dhakakapaj|dhakakapaj]] || [[word:dhakakapash|dhakakapash]] || [[word:dhakakapa|dhakakapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhakapath|dhakapath]] || [[word:dhakapaj|dhakapaj]] || [[word:dhakapash|dhakapash]] || [[word:dhakapa|dhakapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhakafpath|dhakafpath]] || [[word:dhakafpaj|dhakafpaj]] || [[word:dhakafpash|dhakafpash]] || [[word:dhakafpaf|dhakafpaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhakapatha|dhakapatha]] || [[word:dhakapaja|dhakapaja]] || [[word:dhakapasha|dhakapasha]] || [[word:dhakapaka|dhakapaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhakapath|dhakapath]] || [[word:dhakapaj|dhakapaj]] || [[word:dhakapash|dhakapash]] || [[word:dhakapa|dhakapa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhakapathal|dhakapathal]] || [[word:dhakapajal|dhakapajal]] || [[word:dhakapashal|dhakapashal]] || [[word:dhakapakal|dhakapakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhakapathatha|dhakapathatha]] || [[word:dhakapajaja|dhakapajaja]] || [[word:dhakapashasha|dhakapashasha]] || [[word:dhakapaka|dhakapaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhakapathan|dhakapathan]] || [[word:dhakapajan|dhakapajan]] || [[word:dhakapashan|dhakapashan]] || [[word:dhakapakan|dhakapakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhakapathaoro|dhakapathaoro]] || [[word:dhakapajaoro|dhakapajaoro]] || [[word:dhakapashaoro|dhakapashaoro]] || [[word:dhakapakaoro|dhakapakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
